item.label: Rating Scale
item.description: Define your rating scale. Your input must be a number.

item.label: Rating
item.description: Define your rating number. Your input must be a number.

item.label: Show Rating Number
item.description: Here you can choose whether number should be displayed.

item.label: Use Badge
item.description: Here you can choose whether badge should be used.

item.label: Use Button
item.description: Here you can choose whether button should be used.

item.label: Alignment
item.description: Align content to the left, right or center.

item.label: Content Padding
item.description: Define custom padding for the content.

item.label: Rating Spacing Bottom
item.description: Define spacing at the bottom of the rating area.

item.label: Star Size
item.description: Here you can define a custom size for your rating stars.

item.label: Star Spacing
item.description: Define spacing between stars.

item.label: Star Color
item.description: Here you can define a custom color for your rating stars.

item.label: Star Active Color
item.description: Here you can define a active color for your rating stars.

item.label: Rating Text Size
item.description: Here you can define a custom size for your rating text.

item.label: Rating Text Color
item.description: Here you can define a custom color for your rating text.

item.label: Rating Text Spacing
item.description: Define spacing between stars and rating text.

item.label: Image/Icon Position
item.description: Define image/icon position.

item.label: Image Hover Animation
item.description: Select image hover animation.

item.label: Image Height
item.description: This sets a static height for your image.

item.label: Image Width
item.description: This sets a static width for your image.

item.label: Image Padding
item.description: Define custom padding for the image.

item.label: Overlay
item.description: Enable overlay on hover.

item.label: Speed
item.description: Set how long it will take for the overlay to be visible.

item.label: Overlay Icon
item.description: Select icon for the overlay.

item.label: Use Horizontal Position Center
item.description: If enabled the badge will be in horizontally center position.

item.label: Use Vertical Position Center
item.description: If enabled the badge will be in vertically center position.

item.label: Spacing Top
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the top of the button.

item.label: Title Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the title.

item.label: Upload Image
item.description: Upload an image or type in the URL of the image you would like to display.

item.label: Image Alt Text
item.description: Here you can define the HTML ALT text for your image.

item.label: Badge Text
item.description: Define the badge text for your card.

item.label: Title Text
item.description: Define the title text your for card.

item.label: Description
item.description: Input the description text content.

item.label: Button Text
item.description: Define the button text for your button.
